response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level individual contributor role; their senior titles, leadership in open-source projects, and deep expertise in niche stacks like DLang suggest they would be dissatisfied or underutilized, and their basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple roles
Proven full-stack development with React and REST APIs
Active contributor to open-source and developer tooling projects
concerns: Overqualified with senior/staff titles, likely to seek more autonomy than role allows
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience as required
Basic German language skills hinder effective on-site collaboration
